briefdescription.para: This function will reset the driver's logging mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the xv_sdirxss core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will insert an event in the driver's logging mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs core instance.
is the event type to log.
is the associated data for the event.

briefdescription.para: This function will read the last event from the log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will print the entire log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs core instance.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 jsr 07/17/17 Initial release.
